channel.title: Minimal-Linux on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Minimal-Linux on My Linux Journey

item.title: Build Minimal Linux Distro - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Complete guide to building a minimal Linux distro. Covers essential components: kernel, init (BusyBox/systemd/runit), C library, shell, and filesystem.
